title: Auditing and Benchmarking KAN Feed-Forward Layers in Small Language Models
description: Self-contained code + provenance artifact for the paper. Source is vendored under vendor/; model checkpoints are archived separately (see checkpoints/README.md) because of size.

structure.vendor/: Frozen source-only snapshots of the three code repositories (no .git, no checkpoints, no data).
structure.experiments/: Scripts that produced paper figures/tables, plus their small CSV/JSON result outputs under experiments/results/.
structure.figures/: Figure PDFs/PNGs as they appear in the paper.
structure.environment/: Per-repo pyproject.toml + uv.lock for environment reconstruction.
structure.checkpoints/: NOT the checkpoints themselves; an inventory + checksum script + pointer to the external archive.

repositories.name: kan-guppylm
repositories.role: GuppyLM + BabyLM training, HF export/eval, edge audit, pruning, basis screen, grid sweep, profiler
repositories.vendored_from: working-tree snapshot at archival time (observed HEAD 57cb3ee >= 3c8ea92); see git history for any post-3c8ea92 changes

repositories.name: nanochat
repositories.role: ClimbMix training harness, data pipeline, DCLM CORE evaluation (Karpathy)
repositories.vendored_from: working-tree snapshot at commit dc54a1a (matches the paper-pinned commit)

repositories.name: nanokan
repositories.role: GR-KAN wrapper over nanochat; rational FFN implementation; 286M ClimbMix stress tests
repositories.vendored_from: working-tree snapshot at commit 0f047a4 (paper-pinned 8b21df2 / rational-kernel 41a20b5 are ancestors)
repositories.note: PUBLICATION GATE: confirm this internal repo can be released publicly and contains no proprietary code before publishing.

kernel_corrections.description: Safe Pade denominator correction: Q(x)=1+|b0*x+b1*x^2+b2*x^3+b3*x^4| (canonical) replacing the retracted Q(x)=1+|b0||x|+|b1||x|^2+...

inputs: ClimbMix checkpoint BPB logs (see checkpoints archive)
GuppyLM training logs (val loss per seed)
GuppyLM MLP + Wikitext-103 GPT-2-small MLP checkpoints
BabyLM KAN grid-2 checkpoints (5 seeds) + random init

checkpoints.doi: TBD - mint via the HF repo Settings -> Generate DOI (DataCite) after publishing
checkpoints.scope: all run final checkpoints (best.pt); 128 files, ~21.7 GB; includes the 61-run BabyLM matrix plus the GuppyLM screen, grid-size sweep, and Wikitext-103 scale endpoints (286M ClimbMix checkpoints tracked separately). One legacy pre-rename stray (root-level best.pt, unloadable with current code) was excluded.
